creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Fri Jun 28 08:16:17 2013
New Revision: 321953
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/321953

Log:
  - Update to 0.8.9
  
  PR:		ports/180042
  Submitted by:	Christer Edwards <christer.edwards@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/py-salt-cloud/Makefile
  head/sysutils/py-salt-cloud/distinfo
  head/sysutils/py-salt-cloud/pkg-plist

Modified: head/sysutils/py-salt-cloud/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/py-salt-cloud/Makefile	Fri Jun 28 08:13:57 2013	(r321952)
+++ head/sysutils/py-salt-cloud/Makefile	Fri Jun 28 08:16:17 2013	(r321953)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	salt-cloud
-PORTVERSION=	0.8.8
+PORTVERSION=	0.8.9
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}

==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/py-salt-cloud/distinfo	Fri Jun 28 08:13:57 2013	(r321952)

@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@

+SHA256 (salt-cloud-0.8.9.tar.gz) = b829aa6009fbff919db903f8c6d7a80c3a77513a3dcd003aba0be5010cfd7d74
+SIZE (salt-cloud-0.8.9.tar.gz) = 163852
